query:
SELECT 'contacts' as entity, COUNT(*) as total, source FROM contacts WHERE source = 'rd_station_crm' AND deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY source
UNION ALL
SELECT 'deals' as entity, COUNT(*) as total, leadSource as source FROM deals WHERE leadSource = 'rd_station_crm' AND deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY leadSource
UNION ALL
SELECT 'pipelines' as entity, COUNT(*) as total, '' as source FROM pipelines
UNION ALL
SELECT 'stages' as entity, COUNT(*) as total, '' as source FROM pipeline_stages
UNION ALL
SELECT 'tasks' as entity, COUNT(*) as total, '' as source FROM crm_tasks
UNION ALL
SELECT 'accounts' as entity, COUNT(*) as total, '' as source FROM accounts
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lead_sources' as entity, COUNT(*) as total, '' as source FROM lead_sources
UNION ALL
SELECT 'campaigns' as entity, COUNT(*) as total, '' as source FROM campaigns
UNION ALL
SELECT 'loss_reasons' as entity, COUNT(*) as total, '' as source FROM loss_reasons
